title: Tool Call Request
description: Normalized representation of an MCP tools/call (or proxy wrapper). The policy engine evaluates this object.

action.description: Action name. Pattern requires at least one dot — e.g., aws.s3.list_buckets, databricks.sql.execute_query, mcp.proxy.<downstreamUrl>.<downstreamAction>.

arguments.description: Action-specific arguments. Validated against per-action schemas at the MCP boundary (post-MVP).

targets.description: Optional target identifiers (e.g., AWS account IDs).

intentId.description: Optional reference to a previously-declared intent.
